headline: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
summary: NASA launched an emergency mission to save the Swift Observatory. The 20-year-old observatory is in danger of falling to Earth due to solar storms. Katalyst Space Technologies' Link spacecraft is deployed to intercept and boost its orbit.

headline: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
summary: The US Department of Energy deleted ~6,000 pages on energy conservation. This deletion occurred amid a historic US heatwave. The move follows Republican criticism over energy-saving recommendations.

headline: Matic’s robot vacuum is getting a $250 price hike in September
summary: The Matic robot vacuum, a top-rated device, is increasing in price. Its cost will jump by $250, from $1,245 to $1,495. The company states the price hike reflects new value and manufacturing costs.

headline: Flatbush Zombies’ Erick the Architect misses his BlackBerry keyboard
summary: Erick the Architect, from Flatbush Zombies, expressed nostalgia for his BlackBerry keyboard. The artist, known for global tours, values the physical typing experience. This highlights a unique connection to older mobile tech.

headline: The Devil’s Rain Review
summary: This review covers the cult classic horror film, "The Devil's Rain." Severin Films' 4K release breathes new life into the movie. The film explores the materialization of evil in a classic romp.

headline: Mr. Terrific TV Show in the Works With Pilot from The Sandman Alum
summary: DC Studios is reportedly developing a TV show spin-off for Mr. Terrific. The series focuses on the Superman side character and genius superhero. A pilot is in the works with an alum from "The Sandman."

headline: Supergirl Reportedly Faced Creative Differences Between DC Studios and Craig Gillespie
summary: Creative differences reportedly emerged over the "Supergirl" movie's direction. DC Studios and director Craig Gillespie allegedly produced competing cuts. This dispute occurred just months before the film's scheduled release.

headline: Danganronpa 2x2 Delayed to Early 2027
summary: Spike Chunsoft has announced a significant delay for "Danganronpa 2x2." The game's release is now pushed back to early 2027. Fans will need to wait longer for the anticipated title.

headline: Pubs and police brace for England-Mexico 1am kick-off after Fifa U-turn
summary: England's World Cup last-16 match against Mexico is set for a 1 AM BST kick-off. FIFA reversed an earlier decision to bring the game forward. Pubs and police are preparing for the unusual late-night timing.

headline: Prince Harry will not be joined by Meghan and children on London trip
summary: Prince Harry will travel to London alone, without Meghan and his children. Plans changed after their request for taxpayer-funded security was denied. The decision underscores ongoing security arrangement challenges for the family.

headline: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
summary: Ukraine attacked a key oil terminal in St. Petersburg, Russia. President Zelensky stated the target generates revenue for Russia's war effort. The strike targets vital infrastructure supporting the conflict.

headline: The massive scramble behind the scenes before the new PM arrives
summary: Whitehall is experiencing a 'bunfight for jobs' as a new PM takes office. The article describes intense behind-the-scenes activity for new roles. MPs are scrambling for positions as Starmer prepares to move in.
